prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm dawn light falls across the risen Christ and the lifted faces of a close-gathered group, the far cross sinking into shadow behind; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
The risen Christ stands robed at the centre of a close-gathered group of men and women, his scarred hand lifted as he declares among them, their faces turned to him in dawning joy. The cross is now far behind in shadow. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the risen Christ among the gathered group.

Cut to mid framing — the risen Christ at the centre, scarred hand lifted.

Cut to close-up — the risen Christ's living face.

Cut to insert — the lifted scarred hand.

Cut to insert — a face turned to him in dawning joy.

Cut to upper framing — the far cross behind in shadow.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the risen Christ among His brethren.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
A joyful, gathered family.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — risen Christ among the gathered group
Cut to mid framing — risen Christ at the centre, scarred hand lifted
Cut to close-up — the risen Christ's living face
Cut to insert — the lifted scarred hand
Cut to insert — a face turned to him in dawning joy
Cut to upper framing — the far cross behind in shadow
Cut to mid framing — the gathered brethren around him
Return to full composition, end hold on the risen Christ among His brethren
